nodes.label: AI as research and framework provider
nodes.grounding_span: AI gives me a framework, and I go back to make sure all details are correct

nodes.label: AI reliability for factual accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I always double-check the information provided by the AI

nodes.grounding_span: I would not rely on the AI to make the menu from scratch

nodes.label: AI usefulness for unfamiliar cuisines
nodes.grounding_span: I was completely unfamiliar with the cuisine, but the AI really helped me out

nodes.label: AI as skill sharpening tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch that diminishes skills

nodes.label: Professional accuracy and safety
nodes.grounding_span: It would be much worse if an allergen was not properly labeled

nodes.label: Culinary creativity and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I ended up making Argentinian barbecue, all thanks to the AI's suggestion

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: I would have to inform the AI on too much data for it to help me with ordering, so it is easier to do it myself

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for unfamiliar cuisine
nodes.grounding_span: I ended up making Argentinian barbecue, all thanks to the AI's suggestion

nodes.label: Caution due to need for verification
nodes.grounding_span: I always double-check the information provided by the AI

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI capability
nodes.grounding_span: I'm hoping that AI will soon be able to take in every factor necessary to make a menu

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI for ordering
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think the AI will develop enough to handle food ordering beyond organization

nodes.label: Iterative verification — uses AI as draft then double-checks
